title: Database storage encryption enabled
fix_hint: Set `storage_encrypted = true` on RDS, `encryption_at_rest_options` on OpenSearch, encryption-at-rest config on MongoDB Atlas / Firestore.
rationale: 164.312(a)(2)(iv) — Encryption of ePHI at rest (addressable, but breach safe harbor depends on it).

title: S3 / object storage default encryption enabled
fix_hint: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS as default on all buckets holding PHI / backups.
rationale: Breach Notification Safe Harbor (HHS): encrypted PHI per NIST 800-111 is not a reportable breach.

title: Backups encrypted
fix_hint: Encrypt backup snapshots, off-site copies, and DR replicas.
rationale: NIST 800-66 Rev 2 §5.5 — Data backup plan.

title: TLS 1.2+ enforced (no plaintext HTTP)
fix_hint: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Redirect all HTTP → HTTPS. Set `min_tls_version = TLS1_2` on load balancer / CloudFront.
rationale: 164.312(e)(1) — Transmission security.

title: HSTS header set
fix_hint: Add `Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains` on all public endpoints.
rationale: Prevent downgrade and SSL-strip attacks against ePHI in transit.

title: No disabled TLS verification in code
fix_hint: Remove `verify=False`, `rejectUnauthorized: false`, `InsecureSkipVerify: true`, `NSAllowsArbitraryLoads = true`.
rationale: Defeats encryption-in-transit; MITM-able PHI flow.

title: No plaintext http:// URLs to PHI endpoints
fix_hint: Replace http://… with https://… everywhere. Audit env vars too.
rationale: 164.312(e)(2)(ii) — Encryption required for PHI in transit over open networks.

title: Authentication framework present
fix_hint: Add a vetted auth library (Auth0, Clerk, NextAuth, Devise, Spring Security).
rationale: 164.312(a)(1) — Unique user identification (Required).

title: MFA configured (manual verification)
fix_hint: Enable MFA for all admin + privileged accounts. Document enforcement.
rationale: NIST 800-66 §5.3 — Authentication.

title: No wildcard CORS on PHI endpoints
fix_hint: Replace `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` with explicit allowlist.
rationale: 164.308(a)(4) — Information access management.

title: Session auto-logoff configured
fix_hint: Set session timeout ≤ 15 min idle on web/mobile clients.
rationale: 164.312(a)(2)(iii) — Automatic logoff (Addressable).

title: Audit logging implementation present
fix_hint: Log every PHI read/write: who, record id, action, timestamp, IP. Pino, Winston, structlog, Logback.
rationale: 164.312(b) — Audit controls (Required).

title: Log retention ≥ 6 years (manual verification)
fix_hint: Configure CloudWatch / log archive lifecycle for 6yr+. Cite policy doc.
rationale: 164.316(b)(2) — Documentation retention 6 years.

title: No PHI patterns in log statements
fix_hint: Scrub PHI before logging. Use redaction middleware. Replace `logger.info(user.ssn)` patterns.
rationale: Logs are durable storage; PHI in logs = unauthorized disclosure path.

title: Log scrubber / redactor present
fix_hint: Add a redactor (pino-noir, bunyan-redact, structlog processor, Sentry beforeSend).
rationale: Defense-in-depth against accidental PHI in logs.

title: No PHI identifiers in URL query strings
fix_hint: Move identifiers to POST body or opaque tokens. URLs leak to logs, referrers, analytics.
rationale: URL = logged in many places; PHI in URL = disclosure.

title: No hardcoded secrets in source
fix_hint: Move to env vars or secret manager (AWS Secrets Manager, GCP Secret Manager, Vault).
rationale: Hardcoded secrets = PHI exposure on repo leak.

title: .env files not committed
fix_hint: Add `.env` to `.gitignore`. Rotate any exposed credentials.
rationale: Committed secrets = breach reportable.

title: Input validation library present
fix_hint: Add zod / yup / joi / pydantic / class-validator / Bean Validation.
rationale: Reduces injection and PHI integrity risk.

title: No vendors that refuse BAA
fix_hint: Replace flagged vendors (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, Mailchimp, etc.). See docs/BAA_VENDORS.md.
rationale: 164.504(e) — BAA required for any vendor handling PHI.

title: Vendors requiring Enterprise BAA tier flagged
fix_hint: Confirm Enterprise tier active on Sentry, Datadog, Vercel, etc., with signed BAA on file.
rationale: Standard tiers of these vendors exclude PHI; only Enterprise BAA covers.

title: No real PHI patterns in test fixtures / seeds
fix_hint: Use Faker / synthetic data in test/seed files.
rationale: 45 CFR § 164.514(b)(2) — Safe Harbor de-identification for non-prod data.

title: Incident response runbook exists (manual verification)
fix_hint: Document breach response: detection, containment, notification (60-day clock), forensics, postmortem.
rationale: 164.404 — Breach notification within 60 days of discovery.

title: Risk analysis document present (manual verification)
fix_hint: Produce annual risk analysis per NIST 800-30. OCR asks for this first in any investigation.
rationale: 164.308(a)(1)(ii)(A) — Risk analysis (Required).
